entry.title: New: RES24-176 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO TAKE THE STEPS NECESSARY TO ACQUIRE THE QUEEN THEATER PROPERTY, INCLUDING, IF NECESSARY, THE PREPARATION OF A RESOLUTION FOR THE COUNCIL TO INITIATE PROCEEDINGS IN EMINENT DOMAIN.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
